@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant HCP as "HCP"
participant GFPP/PIS as "GFPP/PIS"
participant Aggregator as "Aggregator"
participant CO-Registry as "CO-Registry"
participant CO-Repository as "CO-Repository"
participant CO-IGW as "CO-IGW"
participant OC-RGW as "OC-RGW"
participant OC-Registry as "OC-Registry"
participant OC-Repository as "OC-Repository"

note right of HCP
